response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:37: Identified song as 'ANIMA', performed by Kazama Iroha. Performed a search to identify original artist as ReoNa and retrieve full lyrics. 2. 02:37-03:44: Talk segment identified. 3. 03:44-04:59: Merchandise announcement segment identified.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a musical performance of 'ANIMA' by VTuber Kazama Iroha, followed by a talk segment and a product announcement for her birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: VTuber Kazama Iroha performs a song titled 'ANIMA' on stage. The song's title appears on-screen in the top left. Lyrics are displayed throughout the song. The performer is Kazama Iroha, originally by ReoNa.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
魂の色は 何色ですか
「もういっそ 折れたままで」
捨てるほど 逃げ出すほど 強くないよ
ほら もう一度 鼓動高鳴る
何が正しいかなんて わからないけど
形のないものばかりが 大切になって行く
飾らない言葉だけが 強く結ばれてる
また躓いて 転がって それでも砕けない
魂の色は 何色ですか
ただ傷ついて 強がって それでも見つけたいよ
魂のカタチ 確かめてるよ
深い地の底で一人
扉と鍵を探す
おとぎ話は ほら 泡の様に全部消えて
葛藤 残像だけ 次の頁へ
伸びてく枝葉が分かれて それぞれの道を行く
寂しい思い出だけが 強く根を張ってる
また貫いて失って それでも挫けない
心はどこに 器はどこに
ただ残されて抜け落ちて それでも伝えたいよ
魂の日々を 魂の意志を
ずっと ずっと
魂の色は 何色ですか
赤い色ですか 青い色ですか
魂の色は 魂の色は 何色ですか 何色ですか
透明な過去に 不透明な明日に
生きるあなたは 何色ですか
また躓いて 転がって それでも砕けない
魂の色は 何色ですか
ただ傷ついて 強がって それでも見つけたいよ
魂のカタチ 確かめてるよ
ずっと ずっと ずっと ずっと
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
What color is the color of the soul?
"I'd rather stay broken"
I'm not strong enough to discard it, or run away from it.
Look, once more, my heart is beating fast.
I don't know what is right,
but things without shape are becoming important.
Only the unadorned words
are tightly bound together.
Stumbling again, rolling, even then I won't break.
What color is the color of the soul?
Just getting hurt, putting up a front, even then I want to find it.
I'm verifying the shape of the soul.
Alone in the depths of the earth,
searching for the door and the key.
Fairy tales, look, they all disappear like bubbles.
Only conflicts and afterimages remain, towards the next page.
Growing branches and leaves divide,
walking their own paths.
Only sad memories are firmly taking root.
Piercing again, losing, even then I won't be discouraged.
Where is the heart? Where is the vessel?
Just left behind, slipping out, even then I want to convey it.
The days of the soul, the will of the soul.
Always, always.
What color is the color of the soul?
Is it red? Is it blue?
What color is the color of the soul?
What color is the color of the soul?
What color is it?
In the transparent past, in the opaque tomorrow,
what color are you who are living?
Stumbling again, rolling, even then I won't break.
What color is the color of the soul?
Just getting hurt, putting up a front, even then I want to find it.
I'm verifying the shape of the soul.
Always, always, always, always.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha talks to the audience, thanking them and taking a break to drink water, acknowledging the energetic performance.
Kazama Iroha announces birthday merchandise for the year 2026, presenting items such as a tapestry and a hooded towel.
